data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for deterministic read model rebuild/replay support, but the evidence provided does not confirm this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for this support, yet there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate its implementation. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement as the necessary evidence to confirm the functionality is absent.
gaps: No evidence confirming deterministic read model rebuild/replay support.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
